since_last: 57% of 87 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.10%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.10% · BTC +1.04% · Gold +0.49% · Nasdaq100 -0.43%. 57% of 87 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.10%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.10%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.81%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +16.50%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +16.50%, QCOM +12.14%, AMAT +6.37%, LRCX +6.33%, ARM +5.90%. Laggards: BABA -2.85%, EQIX -2.63%, CRNC -1.32%, BIDU -1.32%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.44% at $156.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.44% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
